projectDescription: A Swift command line tool that generates Xcode projects from a human-readable YAML or JSON project spec, eliminating merge conflicts and keeping files in sync with the filesystem.
keyFeatures: Generate Xcode projects from YAML/JSON spec files
Eliminate .xcodeproj merge conflicts by keeping it out of git
Auto-sync groups and files with directory structure on disk
Share build settings across targets with setting groups
Integrate Carthage, CocoaPods, and Swift Package Manager dependencies
Support for multi-platform frameworks (iOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS)
Include and compose multiple spec files
Cache support to avoid unnecessary project regeneration
publicApiSurface: project.yml spec: name, include, options, targets, schemes, packages, configs, settings, settingGroups
Target: type, platform, sources, dependencies, settings, schemes, buildScripts, buildRules
Scheme: build, run, test, profile, analyze, archive actions
Options: bundleIdPrefix, deploymentTarget, postGenCommand, preGenCommand, settingPresets, carthageBuildPath
